headline: Is Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR) Reasonably Valued Or Too Rich?
summary: Monolithic Power Systems has delivered a very strong 240.7% return over the past five years, yet its current valuation checks lean expensive. This raises the question of how much of that success is already reflected in the US$1,272.81 share price. A 240.7% gain over five years signals that investors have been willing to pay up for Monolithic Power Systems' growth story, so expectations embedded in the stock are high. Recent headlines around both robust business performance and an...
